Bash(python3 -c "
import json
with open\('/mnt/c/Users/Wilso/peptidessssss/data/blog-posts.json'\) as f:
    data = json.load\(f\)
target_slugs = ['bpc-157-complete-guide','ipamorelin-cjc-1295-stack-guide','epithalon-longevity-science','semax-nootropic-deep-dive','ghk-cu-skin-hair-research','best-recovery-peptides-2026']
for p in data['posts']:
    if p['slug'] in target_slugs:
        words = len\(p['content'].split\(\)\)
        ends_correct = p['content'].strip\(\).endswith\('*For research use only. Not for human consumption.*'\)
        print\(f\\"{p['slug']}: {words} words | ends_correct={ends_correct}\\"\)
print\('JSON valid: OK'\)
")

Bash(python3 -c "
import json, re
with open\('/mnt/c/Users/Wilso/peptidessssss/data/blog-posts.json'\) as f:
    data = json.load\(f\)
target = ['bpc-157-complete-guide','ipamorelin-cjc-1295-stack-guide','epithalon-longevity-science','semax-nootropic-deep-dive','ghk-cu-skin-hair-research','best-recovery-peptides-2026']
for p in data['posts']:
    if p['slug'] in target:
        content = p['content']
        words_raw = len\(content.split\(\)\)
        lines = [l for l in content.split\('\\n'\) if l.strip\(\)]
        sections = sum\(1 for l in lines if l.startswith\('##'\)\)
        ends_ok = content.strip\(\).endswith\('*For research use only. Not for human consumption.*'\)
        print\(f\\"{p['slug']}: {words_raw} words | {sections} sections | ends_ok={ends_ok}\\"\)
")
